creator: martinp@tildeslash.com
text:
diff -ruN monit/Makefile monit-new/Makefile
--- monit/Makefile      Mon Nov  5 23:18:16 2007
+++ monit-new/Makefile  Mon Nov  5 23:20:05 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=      monit
-PORTVERSION=   4.9
+PORTVERSION=   4.10
 PORTREVISION=  1
 CATEGORIES=    sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.tildeslash.com/monit/dist/
diff -ruN monit/distinfo monit-new/distinfo
--- monit/distinfo      Mon Nov  5 23:18:16 2007
+++ monit-new/distinfo  Mon Nov  5 23:20:18 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (monit-4.9.tar.gz) = bcbaab776a54d1e34e3a057c925de9ca
-SHA256 (monit-4.9.tar.gz) = 6963046fa976b682d27ac8e78cf7107d76c6907aef27b30f725f371ce64fb4bf
-SIZE (monit-4.9.tar.gz) = 573711
+MD5 (monit-4.10.tar.gz) = 76ca10ba7a3da3736b8540edca16c70a
+SHA256 (monit-4.10.tar.gz) = 07f3af466552b370918de1d3b04322f94a223873a64a151d1f3d6c107626f186
+SIZE (monit-4.10.tar.gz) = 606075
